title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at GAP India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at GAP India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
